moments.author: Pete Hegseth
moments.quote: Authorizing annual testosterone deficiency screenings for soldiers over 30 as part of health assessments
moments.why: A wild, polarizing policy from a high‑profile “Secretary of War” is racking up massive views and debate among men.

moments.author: Steve Kerr
moments.quote: LeBron? Oh, we got him. Put that on Twitter.
moments.why: A casual, deadpan troll from a prominent coach about LeBron’s free agency went instantly viral with comedic force.

moments.author: Mike Tyson
moments.why: The legendary boxer’s bewildered side‑mic moment at the ESPYs launched a viral meme among sports fans.

moments.author: Sam Altman
moments.why: Even a low‑stakes, casual executive post by OpenAI’s CEO draws attention—highlighting how men watch for signals from tech leaders.
